status_notes: CSAF provider. Created from CERT-Bund aggregator + provider-metadata.json data.
alternate_names: TIBCO Product Security Incident Response Team
notes: TIBCO Software (now part of Cloud Software Group) provides middleware, integration, and analytics software. TIBCO PSIRT publishes security advisories in CSAF format for TIBCO products.

data.description: Machine-readable security advisories in CSAF format.
